sourceAmbiguity: Telephony, SMS, and email consoles expose different fields, event names, and signature mechanisms.
decisionTaken: The manifest keeps separate provider-family sections while preserving one internal edge contract and normalized downstream event model.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Provider-specific payload semantics stop at the edge; domain services consume normalized telephony and delivery events.
operationalRisk: A single undifferentiated webhook setting would miss recording callbacks, SMS delivery statuses, or signed email event posture.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Add provider-specific selector entries without changing normalized contract names.
